problem: How to store solar energy at grid scale without chemical battery degradation?
hypothesis: If Quantum tunneling through energy barrier is applied to chemical, then function improves will occur because the mechanism targets the root cause directly.

experiment.protocol: Calorimetric measurement with 7 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The impediment to action advances action. What stands in the way becomes the way. — Marcus Aurelius
